programmes.show_description: Medics act quickly to get David ready for surgery after his vehicle collided with a tractor. Trauma and plastic surgery teams attend Rodger after his paramotor crashed into the ground. (Ep2)
Documentary series. Emmanuel reveals what happened after he returned from working abroad to find himself 24,000 in mortgage arrears and unable to get into his own home.
Reality series. A patient is furious that his ears are still blocked - despite missing hospital appointments to have them syringed.
Dr Natalia Spierings needs a colleague's help after losing the location of a lipoma in patient Pauline's abdomen. Dr Emma McMullen tackles a very visible cyst on patient Steve's face.
Police investigate a series of Polish number plates, and find that a foreign vehicle is being used in the UK without road tax. Traffic police request a vehicle seizure from a car park. (Ep3)

Benidorm double act Will and Steve prepare to return to the stage after a hiatus. Will their crucial comeback performance run smoothly so that Will Sparkle still sparkles?
At the rescue centre, animal re-homer Colin, who has a busy second career as a drag artist, puts potential volunteers through their paces with a series of tests.
Can Graeme Hall stop a Cockerpoo's dirty obsession, and also curtail Ziggy from ransacking his owner's house? Plus, the basics of sit and stay - but without having to say a word.
On one of UK's worst accident hotspots, Andy attends a multiple vehicle pile-up, leading accident investigators to believe that one of the drivers has fallen asleep at the wheel.
PC Jackson's instincts lead him on a high-speed chase. A car with false number plates makes a hasty getaway.
A driver disastrously misjudges an overtaking manoeuvre, while another falls asleep at the wheel on the M1 motorway.
Chris and Andy pursue a drug dealer through some back streets, Kev tracks down a man threatening drinkers with an axe, and Spike has a high speed chase in the countryside.
A pursuit ends in a flaming fireball for Damo and Nyci, while Kev and Mark chase down a gang of motorbike thieves.
Tom tries to pull over a suspected petrol thief, Mike corners a criminal in a text-book manoeuvre and Jim deals with someone who can't control his tongue or his bladder.

programmes.show_name: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car...
programmes.show_description: ...Back! Following car recovery companies that are tasked with taking illegal, unroadworthy, untaxed, uninsured vehicles off the road and ensuring their owners pay the penalty.
Harper demands answers. Mali steps in to defend a friend. Holden's delusion turns dangerous.
Mackenzie remains loyal to Tane. Leah supports Lacey. Will David be able to protect his daughter?
Dr Beecraft sees a patient whose reaction to a diagnosis of terminal cancer is inspirational. Dr Pearce treats a woman with classic symptoms of bereavement.
The dedicated team at Barnsley A&E need to be ready for anything and everything. 20 year old carpet fitter accidentally stabbed himself in the leg at work and needs stitches.
Motorcyclist Danny is rushed into the emergency department following a high-speed road traffic accident in north Wales.
A man found on his kitchen floor in a pool of blood says he is the victim of a hit-and-run car incident. But was he? A motorist is pursued after fleeing the scene of a road collision.
Dr Dev needs a delicate hand to avoid a crucial nerve on a patient's forehead; there's a messy neck cyst for Dr Emma; and Teanna asks Dr Natalia to examine a lump caused by a pony bite.
Documentary series. John and Irene had the fight of their lives evicting a family. Jill invested in a house with her late husband, but it turned into a nightmare.
Documentary series about tenancy issues. A couple from Kent are close to losing their home, a landlord is facing financial ruin, and a young mother is made homeless.
Documentary series about tenancy issues. A landlord tries to evict his non-paying tenant and his seven cats, and a couple try to get their daughter's property back.
Reality series. When a patient suffering from chronic vertigo enters his surgery, Dr Laird leaps into action. Dr Shah uses a tuning fork to assess a man's tinnitus.
At the largest car pound in Northamptonshire, recovery driver Ian returns from an early call out with a BMW seized for blocking access to a residential car park. (Ep4)

Monica invites all those without prior plans to Thanksgiving dinner, but soon wishes she hadn't. Joey gets some embarrassing modelling work.
The gang decide to make New Year's Eve a partner-free zone. But Ross gets around the ban by bringing his new companion - a pet monkey called Marcel.
Chandler's flamboyant mother visits New York, while Phoebe and Monica flirt with a handsome stranger while crossing a road and end up causing a traffic accident.
Phoebe is horrified when she is propositioned by Rachel's Italian boyfriend. Meanwhile, Monica struggles with a surfeit of pasta.
...What Happened Next? Graeme deals with a turf war between a pair of St Bernard's and a Cockapoo. And in Eastbourne, a Welsh Terrier doesn't appear to like to be beside the seaside.
In the new series, as well as tackling canine behavioural issues, Graeme Hall opens his new puppy school. Plus, a hellhound who's tearing a family apart, and viewers' doggie dilemmas.
A battle of wills with an un-Saintly Bernard is causing owner Cody to become isolated from her family. And outbursts from social media star Chihuahua Olive are impacting a couple.
Documentary series following letting agents, eviction experts and housing teams across Britain. A horror house features tampered locks, looped electricity and fresh blood.
Harrow Enforcement are shocked to discover an industrial-scale weed farm in a house.
Letting agent Paul, sales consultant Dale and housing agents Andrew and Jo all find themselves taking pity on tenants in dire straits - will they come to regret their decisions?
